result.stdout:
Usage: log [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Options:
  --last <int?>         (Default: null)
  --tail                (Optional)
  --op <string?>        (Default: null)
  --level <string?>     (Default: null)
  --since <string?>     (Default: null)
  --json                (Optional)
  --prune               (Optional)
  --stats               (Optional)
